sensitivity: 100% (75 of 93 CT structure models); >95% (14 models); >90% (3 models); >85% (1 model); 100% (all MR structure models)
specificity: 100% (29 of 93 CT structure models); >90% (14 models); >80% (12 models); 0-80% (38 models); >85% (all MR structure models)
intended_use: AutoContour is intended to assist radiation treatment planners in contouring and reviewing structures within medical images in preparation for radiation therapy treatment planning.
intended_use_full: AutoContour is intended to assist radiation treatment planners in contouring and reviewing structures within medical images in preparation for radiation therapy treatment planning.
ground_truth: Manual consensus contouring by three clinically experienced experts (2 radiation therapy physicists and 1 radiation dosimetrist) using NRG/RTOG guidelines
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) - CT Large structures mean 0.94±0.03, Medium 0.82±0.09, Small 0.61±0.14; MR structures mean 0.67±0.08
